chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 716 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.2692/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 23-10-2025 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh along with Rashid Nawaz Rajper, Mukhtiarkar Taluka Ubauro and Muhammad Hassan, Survey Superintendent Office, Khairpur >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Assistant AG in terms of order dated 09-10-2025, files compliance report along with photographs of the graveyard on behalf of Deputy Commissioner, Ghotki, Assistant Commissioner and Mukhtiarkar (Revenue) Ubauro, which is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Perusal of the report reflects that entire encroachment over the area of graveyard has now been removed. The respondents shall ensure that no encroachment is made over the area of graveyard in future. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
